file_insights.primary_responsibility: Data access layer for Product, ProductVariant, and ProductModifier entities
Business logic layer for product management with validation and orchestration

patterns_discovered.description: Clear separation between data access (repository) and business logic (service)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Maintainability, testability, and decoupling from database implementation

patterns_discovered.description: All queries and operations require organizationId parameter
Deleted records are marked with deletedAt timestamp rather than removed
patterns_discovered.benefit: Data recovery capability and audit trail preservation

patterns_discovered.description: tsyringe container for service and repository injection

patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents query abuse and ensures predictable performance

patterns_discovered.description: Input validation in service layer before repository operations
patterns_discovered.benefit: Consistent error handling and business rule enforcement

patterns_discovered.description: Include parameter pattern for selective eager loading of related entities
patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents N+1 queries and allows optimization

gotchas_discovered.description: Slugs must be unique per category within organization, not globally
gotchas_discovered.impact: Service validation checks organizationId + categoryId + slug combination
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Repository query includes all three conditions in findBySlug

gotchas_discovered.description: Default variant selection requires explicit ordering by sortOrder field
gotchas_discovered.impact: Improper sorting could lead to unintended default variant selection
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Always order by sortOrder when querying variants

gotchas_discovered.description: maxQuantity field on modifiers but no validation in repository
gotchas_discovered.impact: Business logic layer must enforce max quantity constraints
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Service layer validates modifier quantity constraints

gotchas_discovered.description: Must normalize both page and perPage with bounds checking
gotchas_discovered.impact: Invalid pagination parameters could cause errors or unexpected results
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Repository normalizes: Math.min/max for perPage, Math.max(1, page)

gotchas_discovered.description: Allergen associations are not automatically cascaded on product deletion
gotchas_discovered.impact: Must explicitly handle allergen cleanup in delete operations
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Service layer handles allergen cleanup in deleteProduct

gotchas_discovered.description: Prices use Prisma.Decimal type, not JavaScript number
gotchas_discovered.impact: Direct arithmetic operations may cause type mismatches
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Always treat prices as Decimal type in type definitions

approach_outcome.description: Successfully implemented comprehensive Product service with full variants and modifiers support
deliverables: ProductRepository with 1353 lines providing complete data access layer
ProductService with 950 lines providing business logic and validation
Complete CRUD operations for products, variants, and modifiers
Allergen management with proper association handling
Extensive JSDoc documentation for all public methods

recommendations.recommendation: Create comprehensive unit tests for validation logic in ProductService
recommendations.rationale: Complex validation rules (slug uniqueness, variant defaults, allergen management) require thorough testing

recommendations.recommendation: Add integration tests for repository operations with actual database
recommendations.rationale: Pagination, filtering, and search functionality have edge cases that need validation

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding database indexes for frequently queried fields
recommendations.rationale: organizationId, categoryId, slug, and search fields would benefit from indexes

recommendations.recommendation: Implement validator class or schema validation (Zod/Joi) for input DTOs
recommendations.rationale: Would centralize validation logic and improve maintainability

recommendations.recommendation: Add usage examples in module documentation showing common workflows
recommendations.rationale: Example: creating product with variants, adding modifiers, managing allergens

recommendations.recommendation: Consider batch operations for bulk variant/modifier creation
recommendations.rationale: Current implementation creates items one at a time; batch operations could improve performance

recommendations.recommendation: Extract shared query conditions into helper methods
recommendations.rationale: The notDeleted + organizationId conditions are repeated throughout repository
